creator: taotaojiangshuiyu@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #1)
I'm sorry that I didn't describe it clearly. I just want to run FreeBSD in a VMware virtual machine on my Windows system, but the downloaded package has a problem and VMware can't run properly on my computer. This is the address I downloaded https://download.freebsd.org/releases/VM-IMAGES/14.1-RELEASE/i386/Latest/FreeBSD-14.1-RELEASE-i386.vmdk.xz
It reports an error in VMware, I don't know what happened, I'm just a new user
